title: AAHP Config
description: Optional aahp.config.json consumed by the config-driven AAHP release gates (version-sync, changelog, claims, generator) and by aahp doctor. Every section is optional; an absent file or section makes the corresponding gate a no-op.

$schema.description: Optional JSON Schema reference for editor tooling.

versionSites.description: Files that must contain the current package.json version at least minOccurrences times (checked by check-version-sync.mjs).

file.description: Path relative to the project root.

boundary.description: If true, match on word boundaries so 3.3.0 does not match inside 3.3.09 (default false: literal substring).

note.description: Human-readable reason this file pins the version.

claims.description: Capability numbers pinned to one canonical value across surfaces (checked by check-claims.mjs).

id.description: Short identifier for the claim (used in messages).

advertised.description: The number every surface must carry.

phrase.description: Regex source; capture group 1 is the number to compare.

floorCmd.description: Optional repo-relative path to a Node script whose stdout yields an integer ground-truth floor; advertised must not exceed it. Run with the Node interpreter, no shell (a path escaping the project root is rejected). Omit for an editorial claim.

joinTsConcat.description: If true, join adjacent JS string-literal concatenations before matching.

log.description: Generate a LOG release journal from a CHANGELOG. Opt-in: omit to leave an append-only agent-journal LOG.md untouched.

source.description: CHANGELOG path relative to the project root (default CHANGELOG.md).

target.description: Output path relative to the project root (default .ai/handoff/LOG.md).

title.description: H1 title for the generated journal.

freshness.description: Check that a hand-curated doc's 'Current version: **vX.Y.Z**' line matches package.json.

file.description: Path relative to the project root (default .ai/handoff/NEXT_ACTIONS.md).

forbiddenPatterns.description: Regexes that must NOT appear in tracked files (checked by check-forbidden-patterns.mjs).

pattern.description: Regex source. Store a literal-unicode ban as an escape (e.g. \u2014) so the config file itself does not match.

include.description: git pathspecs to scan (default: common text files).

docSync.description: Groups of sources whose extracted value-set must agree (checked by check-schema-doc-sync.mjs).

pattern.description: Regex; capture group 1 is one value. The set of group-1 values must match across all sources in the group.

docLinks.description: Internal Markdown link checker (check-doc-links.mjs). Presence enables it.

include.description: git pathspecs of docs to check (default: README.md, CLAUDE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, .ai/handoff/*.md).

check.description: Selects which gates `aahp check` runs. Both lists are optional; omit to run every applicable gate. Gate ids: changelog, changelog-format, version-sync, claims, forbidden-patterns, schema-doc-sync, doc-links, handoff.

skip.description: Skip these gate ids (blacklist), applied after only.

pinnedDep.description: Opt-in distribution-pin assertion for the aahp doctor pinned-dep gate. Absent: the gate reports skip. A repo whose own package name equals name reports self.

location.description: Which dependency block must carry the pin (default devDependencies).

allowRange.description: If true, accept a semver range; default false requires an exact pin.
